channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google launches Gemini 2.0 AI models, and showcases their powers in new agents
item.description: Google on Wednesday gave the public and developers a taste of the second generation of its Gemini frontier models, and a preview of some of the agents it will power.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Google claims breakthrough with Willow quantum computing chip but no real-world use yet
item.description: Google’s announcement on Monday of its new quantum chip, called Willow, was full of eye-catching statements. For starters, Willow took less than a minute to perform a benchmark computation that would take one of today’s fastest supercomputers 10 septillion years to do.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Rose Wang says Bluesky is so much more than an X clone
item.description: A huge shift in social media is underway: People are leaving X while millions have flocked to Bluesky, a new upstart powered by a tiny 20-person team. Bluesky’s COO, Rose Wang, addresses this inflection point as dissatisfaction with major platforms continues to grow.
item.dc:creator: Robert Safian, Fast Company

item.title: GM shuts down robotaxi project to focus on autonomous vehicles
item.description: General Motors (GM) said Tuesday that it will no longer fund the development of robotaxis and instead focus on creating fully autonomous personal vehicles. Cruise, GM’s self-driving car subsidiary, will be combined with the automaker’s own team to form a single unit focused on autonomous driving.
item.dc:creator: The Hill

item.title: How to catch the Geminids, one of the strongest meteor showers of the year
item.description: The Geminids are among the few major meteor showers to come from asteroids, and this year they will peak on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Christina Larson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Finding purpose at the intersection of tech and transport
item.description: Transport for New South Wales was first established in 2011, and since then, the culture of putting customers and communities at the center of everything, and partnering with operational agencies, private operators, and industry to deliver passenger focus services and projects, has been a constant.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: GM is pulling the funding for its Cruise robotaxi company
item.description: General Motors is pulling funding from robotaxi company Cruise in order to focus on its own autonomous and assisted-driving systems.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: IC’s new OSINT standards cover open source data, AI services
item.description: As OSINT becomes a major focus for the intelligence community, the new standards give analysts and collectors explicit instructions for citing certain data. The post IC’s new OSINT standards cover open source data, AI services first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Nokia expands data center SONiC support
item.description: Nokia is offering customers an alternative way to set up data center networks by expanding its data center fabric package to support the open-source Software for Open Networking in the Cloud (SONiC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Setapp survey reveals what Mac developers are thinking about right now
item.description: Mac developers have a lot to think about as we close in on 2025, the eighth Mac developer survey from Setapp suggests.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LGBTQ advocates ask leadership to torpedo Kids Online Safety Act
item.description: Advocates for the LGBTQ community asked Democratic congressional leaders to reject the Kids Online Safety Act (KOSA), arguing Monday that it could stifle access to important information online. In a letter to Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: San Jose's Ambitious Eco-Friendly Housing Project Set to Launch in 2025
item.description: Global developer Westbank, PG&E, and San Jose city join forces to create eco-friendly housing towers powered by surplus heat from nearby data centers.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: How to delete multiple emails at once on iPhone
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson shows iPhone users how to easily delete multiple emails and manage their inboxes to reduce digital clutter.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tokio Marine's Accelerated Growth: A Model for Innovation and Career Mobility
item.description: Tokio Marine North America Services' emphasis on growth, diversity of thought, and continuous learning has accelerated an IT culture predicated on innovation and career mobility.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Federal Systems Face Cybersecurity Threats: Energy Department Prioritizes Information Sharing and AI
item.description: Cybersecurity threats to federal systems, Energy Department's approach to information sharing and AI implementation
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Reddit rolls out AI search feature
item.description: Reddit has launched a new AI search feature for its site. The test rollout of Reddit Answers, launched Monday, will allow users to have their questions answered through a new conversational interface.
item.dc:creator: Joanne Haner, The Hill

item.title: Protecting yourself from Microsoft tech support scams
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says scammers exploit fears, falsely claim computer issues to access your personal data.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, Fox 5
